## Summary

Describe the change in plain engineering terms.

## Scope

List what is included.

## Non-Goals

List what is intentionally not included.

## Verification

Describe how this was checked.

## UAT Notes

Describe any user acceptance testing needed, or write `None`.

## Checklist

- [ ] This change stays within the approved scope.
- [ ] No application features or UI were added without approval.
- [ ] Placeholder documents do not present unapproved decisions as facts.
- [ ] Generated caches, build outputs, and local-only artifacts were not committed.
- [ ] Follow-up decisions or questions are documented.
